questions.question: A fair coin is flipped 8 times. What is the probability that exactly 5 heads appear?

A company has two types of employees: A and B. The probability of an employee being of type A is 0.6 and the probability of an employee being of type B is 0.4. What is the probability that three out of five employees are of type A?
A survey of 100 people found that 70 people liked a new restaurant. What is the probability that a randomly selected person from the survey results will like the restaurant?
